---
id: get-public-calendar-ics
title: "Download public calendar as ICS file"
description: "Returns an iCalendar (.ics) file for the publicly shared calendar, suitable for import into calendar apps."
sidebar_label: "Download public calendar as ICS file"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/public/churchcrm-public-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Download public calendar as ICS file"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/public/calendar/{CalendarAccessToken}/ics"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns an iCalendar (.ics) file for the publicly shared calendar, suitable for import into calendar apps.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
